purpose: Protocol-invoked agent builder for pi-protocol compatible Pi packages/extensions.

systemPrompt.text: This agent's full builder prompt is supplied by protocol/agent-builder.ts so pi-pi can keep its protocol knowledge in code and tests. It builds exactly the requested Pi package/extension in the supplied targetDir using pi-protocol 0.2.0.

provides.name: build_package
provides.description: Invoke the pi-pi builder agent to build/adapt/repair the requested pi-protocol compatible Pi package or extension in targetDir. Uses pi-protocol 0.2.0 manifest, ensureProtocolFabric, registerProtocolManifest, and canonical execution objects.
